basic_details.job_title: PAU Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has officially announced the Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening under Advertisement No. EA. GSK1/2026/2409-49. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding an M.Sc. or Ph.D. qualification are eligible to apply for this project-based position. Interested candidates must submit their offline applications on or before 24 July 2026, and eligible applicants will be required to attend the walk-in interview on 11 August 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are shared below.

qualification.details: Research Associate I: M.Sc. in Biotechnology/Fruit Science/Molecular Biology and Biotechnology/Agricultural Biotechnology/Plant Breeding and Genetics with minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 OCPA or 65% marks OR Ph.D. in Biotechnology/Fruit Science/Molecular Biology and Biotechnology/Agricultural Biotechnology/Plant Breeding and Genetics with minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks. Desirable: Experience of working in the areas of Molecular Breeding, Plant Biotechnology, Crop Genomics.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Research Associate I Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.pau.edu. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Research Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application for the PAU Research Associate-I position is 24th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. or Ph.D. degree in specified fields like Biotechnology, Fruit Science, Molecular Biology, Agricultural Biotechnology, or Plant Breeding and Genetics with a minimum OCPA of 6.50/10.00 or 65% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Associate-I post is 35 years. There are no minimum age requirements specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate-I position will receive a salary of Rs. 58,000/- per month, along with an additional 18% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the PAU Research Associate-I job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The application fee for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 200/-. This fee needs to be paid through online payment as specified in the application instructions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate-I position will be based on an Interview. Candidates shortlisted based on their applications will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any experience required for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: While not strictly mandatory, experience in areas like Molecular Breeding, Plant Biotechnology, and Crop Genomics is considered desirable for the Research Associate-I post.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and the application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University (PAU), which is www.pau.edu.

faq.question: Q10. What is the walk-in date mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The notification mentions a walk-in date of 11th August 2026. This date is likely for the interview or further processing of applications.
